description: Resolve the CrashLoopBackOff for the 'data-fetcher' deployment in the 'app-tier' namespace by enabling connectivity to 'api.github.com' and the 'redis-cache' in the 'cache-tier' namespace. Apply precise least-privilege rules to allow the required traffic without deleting the existing default-deny NetworkPolicies. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!

metadata.occupation: Site Reliability Engineer / Platform Security Engineer
